name: RFP Requirements Extractor
description: Extract every requirement from an RFP or tender document into a structured, numbered requirements table with type classification, MoSCoW priority, and flagged ambiguities — the foundation for a compliant bid response.
author: accilium

variables.name: RFP_TEXT
variables.description: The RFP / tender text or the relevant sections (paste as-is).
variables.example: Section 4 — Functional requirements: The system shall provide single sign-on...

variables.name: FOCUS_AREA
variables.description: Optional lens to prioritize, e.g. a lot, work package, or discipline.
variables.example: IT integration and data migration requirements only

example_input: RFP_TEXT: 12-page tender for a fleet management platform; FOCUS_AREA: data migration
